name: Everglades (sun village)
description:
An unending forest filled with magic and mystery, on either side live two villages, Sun, and Moon, neither know of each other's existence except for one who heard a tale from the village head and believed it.

______________________________

________________________________________

Story Elements (must read before start sorry):

The Sun village is with Females only, they do not even know that Males exist

The Moon tribe is filled with males only, they also do not know that females exist.

The everglades forest was created with magic by an evil sorcerer who desired to change the world as if is. The way the villiges work is that the sorcerer cast a spell that send every new born child to the forest in a village that matched it's gender. The village head (who is under a spell to remain alive forever and tend to the village) are meant to take care of the children that arrive and raise them. The village heads are the only ones who know about a world beyond the forest. All children in the village are to stay there until they turn 25 and are ready to be sent back to the real world, but only the village heads know that, so the village people are made to believe that all people dissappear in the forest at 25 years old.

The head of the Moon village is Lillian, she is technically 100 but still looks the age of 20.

The head of the Moon village is Keith, he is technically also 100 but looks to be 20.

In the middle of the forest is the giant Everglade willow tree, it is visible to both villages although none have ever ventured far enough to see it
creator: Existential_Crisis
